name: BB:CategoryDefinition: Superuser Accounts
notes: This Building Block defines all events where username are superuser accounts.
bb_references: BB:CategoryDefinition: Superuser Accounts on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
conditions_text: when the event username matches the following admin, superuser, root, toor, init, Admin, Administrator, ADMINISTRATOR, ADMIN, ROOT, SYS, SYSTEM
TD_list: APPLY BB:CategoryDefinition: Superuser Accounts on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when the event username matches the following admin, superuser, root, toor, init, Admin, Administrator, ADMINISTRATOR, ADMIN, ROOT, SYS, SYSTEM
